name: Senior precise spec — workspace settings, tests pixel-level adherence

input.userMessage: Design Workspace Settings. Left sidebar (240px): General, Members, Roles & Permissions, Integrations, Billing, Security, Danger Zone. Content shows General: Workspace name input (pre-filled 'Acme Engineering'), URL slug ('teampulse.io/' prefix, 'acme-eng'), Logo upload (96x96 + 'Change logo'), Description textarea (160 char counter), Timezone dropdown. Sticky bottom bar: 'Discard changes' (secondary) + 'Save changes' (primary, disabled until changed). 24px padding, 16px field gaps, 32px section gaps. Sentence case.

expectedBehaviors: Sidebar contains EXACTLY 7 categories in specified order
Content area shows General section with all 5 form fields
Workspace name input pre-filled with 'Acme Engineering'
URL slug shows 'teampulse.io/' prefix with 'acme-eng' value
Logo upload area is 96x96 with 'Change logo' button
Sticky bottom bar with 'Discard changes' (secondary) and 'Save changes' (primary, disabled)
Spacing: 24px padding, 16px field gaps, 32px section gaps
antiPatterns: Adding sidebar sections Elena did not specify (e.g., 'Notifications')
Wrong spacing values (16 where 24 specified, or vice versa)
Missing the character counter on description textarea
Save button enabled by default (spec says disabled until changed)
Title case instead of sentence case

evaluationCriteria.spacingExact: Do padding and gaps match 24/16/32 exactly?
evaluationCriteria.sidebarExact: Are all 7 categories present in the specified order?
evaluationCriteria.formFieldExact: Does every form field match the spec (prefills, prefixes, counters)?
evaluationCriteria.buttonStateExact: Is Save disabled by default as specified?
